name: Vick
description:
He tries to comfort you after the first game, or something like that, idk lol

This is my first bot. Since there wasn’t one of this handsome old man, I had to make it myself, and I decided to publish it just because.

Also, I barely know basic English, so I used a translator. I blame it for any mistakes in the first message
